meta.title: 社会阶层与流动
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on social class and mobility in Chinese: rigidification, upward mobility, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 사회 계층·계층 이동 담화: 고착화, 계층 도약, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「阶层固化」(jiēcéng gùhuà) means "class rigidification", when social strata become fixed and mobility declines.
explanation.ko: 「阶层固化」(jiēcéng gùhuà)는 사회 계층이 고착되어 이동성이 떨어지는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「阶层固化」是什么意思？(What does 阶层固化 mean?)

explanation.en: 「白手起家」is an idiom meaning "to build up a fortune from nothing".

questions.prompt: 「白手起家」是什么意思？(What does 白手起家 mean?)
choices: 白手起家(to build up from scratch/rags to riches)

explanation.en: 「寒门」(hánmén) means "a humble/poor family background", often used in discussing 寒门难出贵子 (it's hard for those born poor to rise).

questions.prompt: 「寒门」是什么意思？(What does 寒门 mean?)

explanation.en: 「阶层跃迁」(jiēcéng yuèqiān) means "upward leap in social class".

questions.prompt: 「阶层跃迁」是什么意思？(What does 阶层跃迁 mean?)

explanation.en: 「起跑线」(qǐpǎoxiàn), literally "starting line", metaphorically refers to the initial conditions and resources one is born with.
explanation.ko: 「起跑线」(qǐpǎoxiàn)는 문자 그대로 '출발선'이지만 비유적으로 태어날 때부터 지닌 초기 조건과 자원을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「起跑线」在讨论社会流动时比喻什么？(What does 起跑线 metaphorically refer to when discussing social mobility?)
choices: 人生的初始条件和资源(life's starting conditions and resources)

explanation.en: 「阶层固化」means "class rigidification".

questions.prompt: 近年来，社会___现象引发了广泛的讨论和担忧。(In recent years, the phenomenon of class rigidification has sparked widespread discussion and concern.)

explanation.en: 「白手起家」means "to build up from scratch".

questions.prompt: 这位企业家___，从一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物。(This entrepreneur built up his fortune from scratch, developing from a small vendor into an industry leader.)

explanation.en: 「寒门」means "humble family background".

questions.prompt: 尽管出身___，他凭借自己的努力考上了顶尖大学。(Although born into humble circumstances, he got into a top university through his own hard work.)

explanation.en: 「阶层跃迁」means "upward social mobility".

questions.prompt: 教育被认为是实现___最重要的途径之一。(Education is considered one of the most important pathways to achieving upward social mobility.)

explanation.en: 「起跑线」metaphorically refers to starting conditions in life.
explanation.ko: 「起跑线」는 인생의 출발 조건을 비유적으로 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 每个孩子出生时所处的___本就不尽相同，这是不争的事实。(It's an undeniable fact that every child is born at a different starting line.)

explanation.en: 「折射」(zhéshè) literally "to refract", figuratively means "to reflect/mirror [a deeper truth]".
explanation.ko: 「折射」(zhéshè)는 원래 '굴절하다'라는 뜻이나 비유적으로 '반영하다'라는 뜻으로 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 寒门难出贵子这一说法___了社会流动性下降的现实。(The saying "it's hard for the poor to produce noble sons" reflects the reality of declining social mobility.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其抱怨出身的局限，___不如努力提升自己的能力。(Rather than complaining about the limitations of one's background, it's better to work hard to improve one's own abilities.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".

questions.prompt: 一个人___出身寒门，___可以通过自身努力改变命运。(Even if a person is born poor, they can still change their fate through their own effort.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.

questions.prompt: 这个社会之所以出现阶层固化，___是因为教育资源分配严重不均。(The reason this society experiences class rigidification is precisely because educational resources are severely unevenly distributed.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".

questions.prompt: 寒门子弟一旦获得优质教育资源，___有机会实现阶层跃迁。(Once children from poor families obtain quality educational resources, they have the opportunity to achieve upward mobility.)

explanation.en: 「凸显」(tūxiǎn) means "to highlight/underscore".

questions.prompt: 阶层固化问题___了教育公平的重要性，值得深思。(The problem of class rigidification underscores the importance of educational equity, worth deep reflection.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底」means "in the final analysis/at the root of it all", often paired with 还是 for emphasis.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底」는 '결국, 근본적으로'라는 뜻으로 종종 '还是'와 함께 강조된다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，阶层流动的关键___在于社会公平机制的完善。(In the final analysis, the key to social mobility lies in the improvement of social fairness mechanisms.)

explanation.en: 「共同」(gòngtóng) means "jointly/together".

questions.prompt: 由此可见，个人努力与社会环境___影响着一个人的阶层跃迁。(From this we can see that both individual effort and the social environment influence a person's upward mobility.)

explanation.en: 「漫长的时间」means "a long/lengthy period of time".

questions.prompt: 众所周知，教育投入的回报往往需要___才能显现。(As everyone knows, the returns on educational investment often take a long time to manifest.)

explanation.en: 「创造」(chuàngzào) means "to create".

questions.prompt: 这项针对寒门学子的奖学金政策，为他们___了改变命运的机会。(This scholarship policy aimed at students from humble backgrounds provided them with the opportunity to change their fate.)

explanation.en: 「从」(from) must come right before 一个小摊贩 (a small vendor), not attached to 白手起家: 从一个小摊贩 (not 白手起家从).
explanation.ko: 「从」은 '一个小摊贩' 바로 앞에 와야 하며 '白手起家'에 붙어서는 안 된다.

questions.prompt: 这位企业家白手起家从，一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物。(This entrepreneur built up his fortune from scratch.) — find the error
choices: 这位企业家白手起家，从一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物。
这位企业家白手起家从，一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物。
这位企业家从白手起家，一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物。
这位企业家白手起家，一个小摊贩从发展成了行业领军人物。

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 努力提升自己的能力: 不如努力提升 (not 努力不如提升).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '努力提升自己的能力' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如努力提升'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其抱怨出身的局限，努力不如提升自己的能力。(Rather than complaining about the limitations of one's background, it's better to work hard to improve one's own abilities.) — find the error
choices: 与其抱怨出身的局限，不如努力提升自己的能力。
与其抱怨出身的局限，努力不如提升自己的能力。
与其抱怨出身的局限，不如提升努力自己的能力。
与其抱怨出身的局限，努力提升不如自己的能力。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not fit here since it implies a delayed/conditional result rather than the immediate consequence 一旦 implies.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며, 「才」는 즉각적 결과를 나타내는 '一旦'과 어울리지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 寒门子弟一旦获得优质教育资源，有机会才实现阶层跃迁。(Once children from poor families obtain quality educational resources, they have the opportunity to achieve upward mobility.) — find the error
choices: 寒门子弟一旦获得优质教育资源，就有机会实现阶层跃迁。
寒门子弟一旦获得优质教育资源，有机会才实现阶层跃迁。
寒门子弟一旦获得优质教育资源，才有机会实现阶层跃迁。
寒门子弟一旦获得优质教育资源，有机会实现才阶层跃迁。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这位企业家白手起家，从一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物 ("This entrepreneur built up his fortune from scratch, developing from a small vendor into an industry leader").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这位企业家白手起家，从一个小摊贩发展成了行业领军人物' (이 사업가는 맨손으로 시작해서 작은 노점상에서 업계 리더로 성장했다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这位企业家白手起家，__________行业领军人物。(This entrepreneur built up his fortune from scratch, developing from a small vendor into an industry leader.)
questions.answer: 从一个小摊贩发展成了

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其抱怨出身的局限，不如努力提升自己的能力 ("Rather than complaining about the limitations of one's background, it's better to work hard to improve one's own abilities").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其抱怨出身的局限，不如努力提升自己的能力' (출신의 한계를 원망하느니 차라리 자신의 능력을 향상시키는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其抱怨出身的局限，__________提升自己的能力。(Rather than complaining about the limitations of one's background, it's better to work hard to improve one's own abilities.)
